titleStmt.title: SII 24.82: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 82. (A.R. No. 4 of 1948-49.) III PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Records a gift of land, details lost. The inscription is dated in the 34th regnal year of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
..svastiśrī pukaḻ cūḻn=ta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻn=ta puviyil ponnemiyaḷavun tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jaya makaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattuc cakkara koṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyīṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayir muṉaik kontaḷavaracar tantaḷamiriya vāḷurai kaḻittut toḷvali kāṭṭip porppaṟi naṭāttik kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticaivākai cūṭit tenticait temaru kamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponni ntu punitaṟṟiru maṇimakuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭi taṉṉaṭi Iraṇṭum taṭamuṭiyākat tonnila ventar cūṭa munnai manuvāṟu perukak kaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticai toṟum cella veṇkuṭai
Iru nila viḷākam Eṅkaṇuntanātu tiru niḻal veṇṇilāt tikaḻa Orutanimeruviṟ puli viḷaiyāṭa vār kaṭaṟ ṟivāntarattup pūpālartiṟai vīṭu tanta kalañcorikaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya tennavan karuntalai paruntalaittiṭat tan poṉṉakarp puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa Innāḷ piṟkulappiṟai pol niṟppiḻai yennum colletir koṭiṟ ṟallatu villetir koṭā vikkalaṉ kallata naṅkili tuṭaṅka maṇalūr naṭuvenat tuṅka pattirai ḷiṟu viṭṭa tan mānamuṅ kūṟiṉa vīra muṅ kiṭappa Eṟina malaikaḷu mutuku neḷippa Iḻinta natikaḷum cuḻanṟuṭaintoṭa viḻnta kaṭal rit talamara kuṭaticai taṉ kantu tāṉum tātaiyum paṉṉā
tiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻin celviyum vāḷaravi maṭanta yariṭṭamum miḷātu koṭutta veṅkariniraiyum kaṅkamaṇṭala mum ciṅkaḷameṉṉum pāṇi Iraṇṭum Oru vicaik koṇṭiṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭi maṇṭalamuṅ koḷḷat tiruvuḷḷat taṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittalaṅkaḷum poruparittaraṅkamum tantira vāriyumuṭaittāy vantu vaṭa kaṭal ten kaṭal paṭarvatu polat tan peruñceṉai yevip pañcavaraiyvarum poruta po �ṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭaṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vaṉacararākki poṟṟa veñcura meṟṟik koṟṟa vijaiyastampam ticai toṟum muttamiḻ potiyamu matta veṅkaripaṭumayyaṟcayamum
tenṉāṭṭellai kāṭṭik kuṭamalai nāṭṭuḷḷa cāveṟel lām tani vicum peṟa māveṟiya tanvarutaniṟ ṟalaivaraik kuṟukalar kulaiyak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟi toṟu nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷi tirai koḷāramun tiruppulattalaṅkalum pola vīramum tiyākamum viḷaṅkap ṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷa kaṅkai vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya maṅkayar tilatam Eḻicaivallavi Eḻulakamuḻutuṭaiyā vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya tiripuvanac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulottuṅka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 34 Āvatu .... ṟāṇṭikulācaṉi vaḷa
ṣṇavavāriyam nālūrt tirunāṭuṭaiyān nampi yum puliyūr vaṇṭuvarāvati nampiyum varakūṟ civayiṣṇava dāsarum Ālaṅkuṭi tiruvāyppāṭi dāsarum Iṭavai tiruvaraṅka māḷiyum kāñcikkuṟi vaṭa kopura muṭaiyāṉāna ciriyaṉ kecavaṉāna taniiḷañciṅkamum pāratāyaṉ kecuvaṉ Evariyānum pāradāya cempoṉ cotiyum Āritan cirākavan cikāri māṟaṉūm Āka Ivvaṟuvarum koyil mutak kaṇakku perumpuṟakkaṭal vāmana nā
tukkoḷḷap peṟuvanākavum Ipparicu Icaintu Ivvaḷaveḷūr titārkkāṇi tirumaḻa pāṭi dāsanum paṭṭanāna śrī caṭakopa nampikku
ppaṭikku Ārāvamutu Aṟivariyānāna śrī vaiyiṣṇavappiriyaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku kaṇ � paḷḷi koṇṭā nampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku perumpu
Ārāvamutu puṇṭarīka neḻuttu Ippaṭikku pāratāyan cirāman Ārāvamuti neḻuttu Ippaṭikku cirākava neḻuttu Ippaṭikku
Digital edition of SII 24.82 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
